case_title: TENORIO ANA VS FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04 TRIAL OF JUL-09-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $877.16 FILED BY TENORIO ANA AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE WALLACE KATHLEEN WALLACE RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

POS ON FARMERS INS.INVALID.DOES NOT SHOW NAME/ ADDRESS OF SERVER.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE KATHLEEN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENORIO ANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE WALLACE KATHLEEN TIME ISSUE MOOT ALL PARTIES PRESENT & AGREE TO BE HEARD. RELEASE IS COMPLETE DEFENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
